description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a wooden and fabric appearance, featuring two stacked wings with roundels on the upper surfaces and a classic open cockpit. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers towards the tail, which has a vertical stabilizer adorned with a tricolor pattern. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid. The wings are braced with struts and wires, giving the aircraft a sturdy, old-fashioned look. The overall color scheme is a warm brown with cream accents and blue-red roundels, evoking early 20th-century military aircraft.
description: A vintage brown biplane with stacked wings, open cockpit, and classic roundel markings, featuring a wooden propeller and tricolor tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual stacked wings, central propeller, and open cockpit behind the engine.
description_view_1: Top oblique view highlighting the roundels on the upper wings and the tricolor tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, twin horizontal stabilizers, and the full span of the biplane wings.
description_view_3: Top oblique view from the opposite side, showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear alignment.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts and wires; no winglets or sweep; slight dihedral on lower wing.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers; classic rudder and elevator surfaces.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the engine and upper wing, with minimal windscreen.
